title: Copperflare- Guns
description: Adds guns, which can be made with Tempered Copper.
body:
Adds guns, which can be made with Tempered Copper.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/N2bEwW8-qYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

MAKING TEMPERED COPPER
In the Crafting Table, you can make Tempered Raw Copper by putting 7 raw copper blocks in all slots except the bottom right and top left, and then you can get Tempered Copper by melting it in the furnace.

MAKING GUNS
Each gun has different materials and recipes. But in short, you can make them with tempered copper and other materials in crafting table.

USING GUNS
To use weapons, you need bullets. Each type of gun has a different bullet, and the recipe for each bullet is different.

OTHER
You can make patterned guns with glazed terracotta and blueprints sold by wandering traders using a smithing table. Also, this mod adds a lot of advancements!

All sounds were taken from https://pixabay.com.
